        - [View Overview Dashboard](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/t_Overview.md) -- The Overview dashboard provides a graphical representation of HR cases.
        - [View Manager Dashboard](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/t_UseTheHRManagerDashboard.md) -- You can use the Manager Dashboard to monitor HR team effectiveness based on metrics. Metrics includes state of assigned cases by HR agent and service level agreement (SLA) elapsed time percentage.
        - [View HR Case Dashboard](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/c_HRCaseDashboard.md) -- The HR Case Dashboard is a central place for HR users to monitor ongoing HR operations. The dashboard contains reports that query the database and display the results.
        - [Run Reports](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/t_RunningHRReports.md) -- You can run reports to view and monitor the status of HR cases.
          - [Available HR reports](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/r_AvailableReports.md) -- Predefined HR reports are available in the HR Case Management Reports list.
        - [Evaluate HR survey responses](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/t_EvaluateHRSurveyResponses.md) -- After you have collected responses to an HR survey, you can review the survey responses and scorecard.
        - [Satisfaction Survey Scorecard](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/t_SatisfactionSurvey.md) -- Apply filters to refine the predefined HR satisfaction surveys results to analyse and gain insight into the survey.
      - [HR Service Delivery Process Mining](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/process-opt-hrsd.md) -- Integrating the Process Mining application with the HR Service Delivery application enables you to analyze processes relevant to your KPIs, and identify bottlenecks associated with HR service cases and, if installed, Lifecycle Events cases.
      - [HR Service Delivery integration with Service Portfolio Management and Digital Portfolio Management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/ckm-csdm.md) -- HR Service Delivery integration with Service Portfolio Management and Digital Portfolio Management enables you to manage HR services in a standardized, structured format as suggested in the Common Service Data Model (CSDM) methodology. It ensures that the hierarchy in which you define services is consistent with the hierarchy of other business units.
        - [Adopt CSDM methodology](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/config-business-csdm.md) -- Manage services of your business unit in a standardized, structured format as suggested in the Common Service Data Model (CSDM) methodology. Ensure that the hierarchy in which you define services is consistent with the hierarchy of other business units.
          - [HR Service Delivery and CSDM tables](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/hrsd-csdm.md) -- HR Service Delivery manages (contributes data to) CSDM tables. HR Service Delivery also uses data from CSDM tables that other applications generate. Several ServiceNow products, therefore, benefit from and add value to HR Service Delivery.
          - [CSDM roles for configurations](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/roles-csdm.md) -- Roles required for creating or viewing Common Service Data Model (CSDM) service table configurations and service mappings.
          - [Create service table configuration](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/config-service-table.md) -- Create a service table configuration for your Business Unit (BU). Associate your BU service mappings to the correct service table configuration.
          - [Configure CSDM service mappings](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/config-csdm-ser-map.md) -- Configure Common Service Data Model (CSDM) service mappings to the appropriate service table mappings. Ensure that the services or service offerings are tagged with the right business portfolio.
      - [HR Benchmarks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/hr-benchmarks.md) -- The HR Benchmarks application provides you with an insight into the industry averages of your peers. Use your Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) to compare your performance with global benchmarks, which contributes to improved performance for your organization.
        - [Customizing HR benchmarks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/choose-hr-kpi.md) -- Choose HR KPIs based on your business requirements.
        - [Using HR Benchmarks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/using-hr-benchmarks.md) -- Gain instant visibility into your key performance indicators (KPIs) and trends, as well as comparative insight relative to industry averages of your peers and to the industry top performers.
        - [HR Benchmarks KPIs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/hr-benchmarks-kpi.md) -- You can enable or disable a benchmark KPI, and customize KPI conditions. Integration with Performance Analytics provides daily data collection and drill down capabilities on KPI data.
      - [Personal Data Rights in HR Service Delivery](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/rtbi-compliance-hr.md) -- HR customers can enable personal data protection for their employees and alumni by implementing General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) rules as a result becoming a GDPR compliant organization.
        - [Request personal information report](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/request-personal-information-report-rtbi.md) -- As an employee or alumni, request your personal information report so that you can review it or be aware of your personal data held by your organization.
        - [Create RTBI report template](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/create-rtbi-report-template.md) -- Create a custom RTBI report template to use for the RTBI report displayed to the employee or alumni. The base system report generation uses the default template HR PII Template.
        - [Generate Personally Identifiable Information (PII) report](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/generate-pii-report-rtbi.md) -- As an HR agent, generate the PII report requested by the employee or alumni.
        - [Request erasure of personal data](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/request-erasure-personal-data-rtbi.md) -- As an employee or alumni, request erasure of your personal information when you no longer consent to processing, when there are significant errors within the data, or if you believe that the information is being stored unnecessarily.
      - [Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/reference-ckm.md) -- Reference topics provide additional information abou the lists and forms that you use to configure and use Case and Knowledge Management.
        - [Components installed](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/components-installed-with-case-and-knowledge-management.md) -- Several types of components install with the activation of the Case and Knowledge Management plugin, including tables, user roles, and scheduled jobs.
      - [Employee Relations](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/hr-case-employee-relations.md) -- With Employee Relations (ER), handle a sensitive complaint with tighter security. Maintain complete confidentiality and protect the privacy of the user who has raised the complaint.
        - [Exploring Employee Relations](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/explore-er.md) -- Learn how to use Employee Relations starting from raising a complaint till the closure of ER case.
        - [Configuring Employee Relations](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/hr-er-setting-up.md) -- Set up HR Service Delivery Employee Relations (ER) so that your agents can engage with your employees, answer questions, create ER cases, create related records, and resolve issues.
          - [Activate Employee Relations](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/activate-hr-employee-relations.md) -- You can activate Human Resources Scoped App: Employee Relations [com.sn_hr_employee_relations] if you have the admin role. This plugin includes demo data and activates related plugins if they are not already active.
            - [Components installed](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/activate-hr-employee-relations.md) -- You can activate Human Resources Scoped App: Employee Relations [com.sn_hr_employee_relations] if you have the admin role. This plugin includes demo data and activates related plugins if they are not already active.
          - [Employee Relations case restrictions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/hr-er-case-restriction.md) -- Use Case Restriction Configuration to determine what groups and agents can access or restrict ER cases.
            - [Configure an employee relations case restriction](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/hr-er-create-case-restriction.md) -- Define what groups can view or access employee relations cases using Case Restriction Configuration.
            - [HR for HR Security](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/hr-case-restriction-er-agent.md) -- Even Employee Relations agents with privileges to view and modify an ER case are limited from viewing, modifying, or restricting and ER case under certain circumstances for security purposes.
          - [Create a COE security policy](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/hr-create-coe-security-policy.md) -- Use COE Security Configuration to define group restrictions for a COE and for all or specific HR services under it.
          - [HR services for Employee Relations](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/er-hr-services.md) -- List of default HR services for Employee Relations.
          - [Employee relations allegation types and subtypes](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/hr-er-allegation-types.md) -- Allegation types and subtypes help you further define an employee relations case.
            - [Configure an employee relations allegation type](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/hr-er-create-allegation-type.md) -- Create allegation types and subtypes to help provide details on an employee relations case.
          - [Employee Relations assignment rules](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/hr-er-assign-rules.md) -- HR Service Delivery employee relations assignment rules allow you to automatically assign a group to ER cases when the assignment group is empty.
          - [Employee Relations matching rules](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/hr-er-matching-rules.md) -- Because ER cases do not use a subject person, matching rules try to find an agent with the required skills and in the same country where the case was opened to determine case assignment.
          - [Employee Relations accommodations](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/hr-er-accommodations.md) -- Accommodation requests are from your employees requesting changes related to their work situation.
            - [Create accommodation types](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/hr-er-accommodation-type.md) -- Accommodation types help define and categorize accommodation requests.
          - [Interview Management for Employee Relations](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/hr-er-interview-1.md) -- Use Interview Management to create templates to capture questions, answers, and notes in a consistent and efficient way, sync scheduling with Microsoft Outlook, and better plan and track your interviews.
            - [Setting up Interview Templates](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/hr-er-interview-1.md) -- Use Interview Management to create templates to capture questions, answers, and notes in a consistent and efficient way, sync scheduling with Microsoft Outlook, and better plan and track your interviews.
              - [Activate Interview Templates](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/hr-er-interview-1.md) -- Use Interview Management to create templates to capture questions, answers, and notes in a consistent and efficient way, sync scheduling with Microsoft Outlook, and better plan and track your interviews.
              - [Create an interview question template](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/hr-er-interview-1.md) -- Use Interview Management to create templates to capture questions, answers, and notes in a consistent and efficient way, sync scheduling with Microsoft Outlook, and better plan and track your interviews.
              - [Create an interview template tag](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/hr-er-interview-1.md) -- Use Interview Management to create templates to capture questions, answers, and notes in a consistent and efficient way, sync scheduling with Microsoft Outlook, and better plan and track your interviews.
          - [Evidence Management for Employee Relations](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/hr-er-evidence-mgmt.md) -- Use Evidence Management to capture and categorize evidence for Employee Relations or related cases.
            - [Setting up Evidence Management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/hr-er-evidence-mgmt.md) -- Use Evidence Management to capture and categorize evidence for Employee Relations or related cases.
              - [Create evidence types](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/hr-er-evidence-mgmt.md) -- Use Evidence Management to capture and categorize evidence for Employee Relations or related cases.
          - [Configure a PIP lifecycle event](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/pip-act-admin.md) -- After a PIP request is initiated by a manager, a structured workflow (a predefined lifecycle event) auto-initiates tasks for a manager, an employee, and an ER agent.
        - [Using HR Service Delivery Employee Relations](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/hr-er-using.md) -- Creating an HR Service Delivery Employee Relations (ER) case is similar to creating any HR case with some differences.
          - [Use guided tours](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/guided-tour-er.md) -- Use guided tours in Employee Relations to get an overview of Employee Relations cases.
            - [Enable guided tours](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/activate-guided-tours.md) -- Enable guided tours in Employee Relations to get an overview of Employee Relations cases.
          - [Create an Employee Relations case in Core UI](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/create-hr-employee-relations.md) -- You create ER cases for employees that wish to report misconduct, discrimination or a disciplinary issue.
          - [Create an Employee Relations case in Agent Workspace for HR Case Management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/create-hr-er-ws.md) -- You can use HR Service Delivery Agent Workspace to create ER cases for employees that wish to report misconduct, discrimination, or a disciplinary issue.
          - [Create an allegation record](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/hr-er-create-allegation.md) -- Use Allegations to provide additional details for an ER case.
          - [Create an involved parties record](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/hr-er-involved-parties.md) -- Capture information about people associated with the ER case. Involved parties can be the complainant, subject of the allegation, a witness, or other (undefined).
          - [Using Interview Management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/using-interview-management.md) -- You can schedule and document interviews and use interview templates using the Core UI or HR Service Delivery Agent Workspace.
            - [Scheduling an interview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/hr-er-ws-calendar.md) -- You can use the default ServiceNow calendar or integrate with Microsoft Exchange to schedule interviews related to Employee Relations (ER) cases.
            - [Schedule an interview in legacy UI](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/hr-er-interview.md) -- Documenting interviews is crucial to ER cases. Use the Interview form to take notes and capture important details of the ER case.
            - [Schedule an interview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/hr-er-interview-ws.md) -- Use Agent Workspace for HR Case Management to capture a record of an interview.
          - [Using Evidence Management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/hr-er-evidence-using.md) -- You can create, edit, and categorize evidence related to an employee relations case using the Core UI or HR Service Delivery Agent Workspace.
            - [Add evidence in legacy UI](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/hr-er-evidence.md) -- Create evidence records to attach to an Employee Relations case to help with investigations.
            - [Add evidence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/hr-er-evidence-ws.md) -- Create evidence records to attach to an Employee Relations case to help with investigations using Agent Workspace for HR Case Management.
          - [Create a corrective action](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/hr-er-corrective-actions.md) -- Create a corrective action record for an ER case.
          - [HR Service Delivery Employee Relations dashboards](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/hr-er-dashboards.md) -- The HR Service Delivery Employee Relations dashboards provides visual reports that give you statistics on ER cases.
          - [Employee Relations Performance Analytics Executive Overview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/hr-er-par.md) -- The HR Service Delivery Employee Relations (ER) Performance Analytics (PA) dashboard provides you with historical trends, data comparisons.
          - [Performance Improvement Plan (PIP) service](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/pip-service.md) -- Manage employee performance issues within Employee Relations using the Performance Improvement Plan (PIP) service.
            - [Initiate a PIP request](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/raise-pip.md) -- Initiate a PIP request for your employee. Have structured conversations with your employee on performance improvement, and have an agreed course of action with HR or the Employee Relations department.
            - [Acknowledge a PIP request](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/acknowledge-pip.md) -- Acknowledge the PIP request that is initiated by your manager. Complete other tasks that have been assigned to you.
            - [Complete PIP assessment](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/submit-pip-assessment.md) -- As a manager, complete the PIP assessment indicating whether the PIP is successful.
        - [Analytics and Reporting Solutions for Employee Relations](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/er-hr-par.md) -- Analytics and Reporting Solutions contain prepackaged Performance Analytics content for use with other ServiceNow AI Platform products. This Analytics and Reporting Solution provides you with historical trends and data comparisons for Employee Relations to assess organizational performance.
          - [Activate](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/er-hr-pa-install.md) -- Activate the content pack plugins for the Analytics and Reporting Solution.
          - [Configure](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/er-hr-pa-config.md) -- Run diagnostics, review and customize components, and start collecting data.
          - [Dashboard overview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/er-hr-pa-eo.md) -- The Employee Relations Executive Overview dashboard provides you with high level data on Employee Relations cases and detailed information on the types of ER cases, locations, cases by HR service and department, and trends.
        - [Anonymous Report Center (ARC)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/arc-portal.md) -- The Anonymous Report Center (ARC) enables employees to report discrimination or misconduct without revealing their identity. Employees are automatically signed out of the Employee Center when the ARC opens.
          - [Configure](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/arc-setup.md) -- Activate and set up the Anonymous Report Center (ARC) to provide your employees a way to report misconduct complaints anonymously to the agent.
            - [Activate the Anonymous Report Center](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/arc-activate.md) -- You can activate the Anonymous Report Center plugin (com.sn_anonymous_report_center) for the ServiceNow AI Platform if you have the admin role.
            - [Add ARC catalog items to the Employee Center](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/add-arc-menu.md) -- Give employees access to the Anonymous Report Center (ARC) by adding the catalog items to the Employee Center. Once added, employees can report misconduct or discrimination or open the ARC homepage from the Human Resources Employee Conduct page or via search.
          - [Using the Anonymous Report Center](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/arc-use.md) -- Your employees can use the Anonymous Report Center (ARC) to submit sensitive complaints or misconduct cases anonymous to the agent working on the case.
            - [Anonymously report misconduct](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/arc-create-anon-report.md) -- Create misconduct cases that are sent to your Human Resources department without your identity being revealed.
            - [Anonymously report discrimination](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/arc-report-discrimination.md) -- Create discrimination cases that can be sent to your Human Resources department without your identity being revealed.
            - [Access an anonymous report](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/arc-access-anon-report.md) -- You can retrieve your anonymous report to submit or view comments and updates from the agents working on your anonymous report. You must have the report key and report number in order to access your anonymous report.
        - [Employee Relations integration](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/emp-relations-legal.md) -- Employees can submit complaints through the Employee Center portal without worrying about who should investigate the complaint. During the triaging or investigation process, fulfillers working on these issues can transfer them back and forth between the Legal and HR departments as necessary for resolution.
          - [Integration workflow](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/emp-relations-legal.md) -- Employees can submit complaints through the Employee Center portal without worrying about who should investigate the complaint. During the triaging or investigation process, fulfillers working on these issues can transfer them back and forth between the Legal and HR departments as necessary for resolution.
    - [HR Documents](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/hr-esigning-app.md) -- Apps that support documents in HR.
      - [Employee Document Management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-document-management/hr-employee-doc-management.md) -- Manage large numbers of documents more efficiently with the ServiceNow Employee Document Management product. Employee Document Management provides storage space, a filing system, the ability to easily retrieve documents, defining who can view sensitive documents, and when to purge documents.
        - [Explore](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-document-management/exploring-employee-document-management.md) -- With Employee Document Management, you can streamline document management and maintain documents with integrity, accuracy and access controls.

This plugin includes demo data and activates related plugins if they are not already active.

            - [Add or modify default retention policies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-document-management/hr-doc-management-config.md) -- Use Employee Document Management to configure how employee documents should be handled based on company policy, processes, and regulatory compliance.
            - [Add or modify a retention policy](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-document-management/hr-doc-management-config.md) -- Use Employee Document Management to configure how employee documents should be handled based on company policy, processes, and regulatory compliance.

            - [Add or modify expiration policies on a document type](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-document-management/hr-doc-management-config.md) -- Use Employee Document Management to configure how employee documents should be handled based on company policy, processes, and regulatory compliance.
        - [Use](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-document-management/using-employee-document-management.md) -- Manage employee documents and learn about bulk imports.

            - [Add legal hold to multiple HR profiles](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-document-management/hr-doc-management-admin.md) -- Use Employee Document Management to search, create, move, or manage legal holds on employee documents.
            - [Add legal hold to multiple document types](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-document-management/hr-doc-management-admin.md) -- Use Employee Document Management to search, create, move, or manage legal holds on employee documents.
            - [Manage documents on legal hold](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-document-management/hr-doc-management-admin.md) -- Use Employee Document Management to search, create, move, or manage legal holds on employee documents.
            - [View employee document purge logs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-document-management/hr-doc-management-admin.md) -- Use Employee Document Management to search, create, move, or manage legal holds on employee documents.
          - [Bulk imports](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-document-management/edm-bulk-uploads.md) -- Use the Employee Document Management Bulk Imports feature to copy your employee documents from an external third-party cloud-based storage or a local network directory to Employee Document Management. Having your employee documents within HR Service Delivery makes administration efficient and convenient.
            - [Locate and transform documents](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-document-management/import-mapping.md) -- Import mapping locates your source employee documents from your source document repository and transforms them to import them to Employee Document Management.
            - [Configuring bulk import](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-document-management/edm-bulk-configuration.md) -- Use Employee Document Import Configuration to identify and communicate with the source document repository. The source document repository is where you currently store your employee documents.
              - [Create or edit import configuration](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-document-management/edm-bulk-configuration.md) -- Use Employee Document Import Configuration to identify and communicate with the source document repository. The source document repository is where you currently store your employee documents.
              - [Create or edit the verify source step](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-document-management/edm-bulk-configuration.md) -- Use Employee Document Import Configuration to identify and communicate with the source document repository. The source document repository is where you currently store your employee documents.
              - [Create or edit the stage directory lookup source step](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-document-management/edm-bulk-configuration.md) -- Use Employee Document Import Configuration to identify and communicate with the source document repository. The source document repository is where you currently store your employee documents.
              - [Create or edit the stage file source step](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-document-management/edm-bulk-configuration.md) -- Use Employee Document Import Configuration to identify and communicate with the source document repository. The source document repository is where you currently store your employee documents.
              - [Create or edit capture source step](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-document-management/edm-bulk-configuration.md) -- Use Employee Document Import Configuration to identify and communicate with the source document repository. The source document repository is where you currently store your employee documents.
            - [Bulk import map examples](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-document-management/edm-map-examples.md) -- Mapping your source employee documents to required elements in Employee Document Management is crucial for a successful bulk import.
            - [Correcting employee documents in the staging table](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-document-management/edm-doc-staging.md) -- Use the Employee Document Staging form to correct staging records prior to importing to HR Service Delivery. Staging records are created after you have mapped your source employee documents and the Start staging job has run.
        - [Dashboard](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-document-management/edm-dashboard.md) -- Gain insight into macro trends more efficiently on a single dashboard-style page showing you important metrics on employee documents, status of purging and purge settings, and legal holds.
          - [View dashboard](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-document-management/edm-dashboard.md) -- Gain insight into macro trends more efficiently on a single dashboard-style page showing you important metrics on employee documents, status of purging and purge settings, and legal holds.
        - [Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-document-management/reference-employee-document-management.md) -- More information on other properties of Employee Document Management.
          - [Properties](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-document-management/employee-doc-properties.md) -- Activating the Employee Document Management [com.sn_employee_document_management] plugin adds the following properties.
          - [Components installed](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-document-management/installed-w-employee-doc-mngemnt.md) -- Several types of components install with the activation of the Employee Document Management [com.sn_employee_document_management] plugin, including tables, user roles, and scheduled jobs.
      - [Document Templates](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/document-templates-overview.md) -- With the ServiceNow Document Templates application, you can create HTML and PDF document templates to generate standard letters or documents. You can automate and simplify the process of filling, signing, and reviewing a document online.
        - [Configuring Document Templates](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/set-up-doc-temp.md) -- Set up Document Templates to automate and simplify the process of filling, reviewing and signing a document online.
          - [Document template categories](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/document-types-document-templates.md) -- Document template categories help you to categorize similar documents together. It makes finding the correct document template easier.
          - [Document Templates of type HTML](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/document-templates-flow-html.md) -- An HTML document template uses variables to pre-fill information from tables into the document. You can create how the document looks by defining the header, footer, images, placement of footer, and the text within the template. Using the HTML document template, you can collect e-signatures from multiple participants and generate a PDF document online.
            - [Configure an HTML document template](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/configure-HTML-doc-template.md) -- Create or modify the document template with your unique company logo and audience criteria.
            - [Create participants for an HTML document template](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/create-participants-html.md) -- Define actions and the order of actions for participants. The type of action and order are considered while initiating document tasks.
            - [Insert signatures](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/insert-signatures.md) -- Insert signatures in an HTML document template by selecting participants from the list.
            - [Variables supported in HTML document templates](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/variables-html.md) -- Include customized variables in a document template in addition to the variables that are available in the Select Variables field in the HTML document template configuration page.
              - [Add customized variables in a document template](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/add-variables-html.md) -- Customize variables at a record producer level, and call out those variables in the HTML document template that you are configuring.
            - [Document template scripts](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/document-template-scripts.md) -- With document template scripts, you can dynamically change the text in the body of the HTML template. Document template scripts allow you to perform simple tasks, such as displaying HR data, and complex ones, such as making advanced database queries.
            - [Document blocks in Document Templates](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/doc-block-temp.md) -- Replace blocks of text in a document based on certain rules so that you do not have to create multiple template versions of the same document.
              - [Create document blocks in Document Templates](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/create-doc-blc.md) -- Create document blocks that you can use in multiple HTML templates.
              - [Create block content in Document Templates](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/create-doc-blc-cnt.md) -- Each document template block can have multiple block contents. Each content mapping to a condition.
              - [Use Localization Framework for Document Templates](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/doc-lzt-fm.md) -- Translate content in Document Templates and document blocks Localization Framework.
          - [Document Templates of type PDF (Advanced forms)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/document-templates-PDF-flow.md) -- A PDF document template originates from a fillable PDF or a standard PDF with inline signatures. Using the PDF document template, you can collect details and e-signatures from multiple participants, review, and generate a filled PDF document.
            - [Configure a PDF document template](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/configure-editable-pdf.md) -- Upload an editable, fillable PDF template and customize the template as per your business needs.
            - [Define a PDF field mapping](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/edit-pdf-mappings.md) -- Define editable fields and store signature mappings using the PDF field mappings section.
            - [Create participants for a PDF document template](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/create-participant.md) -- Define actions and the order of actions for participants. The type of action and order are considered while initiating document tasks.
            - [Mark a signature block](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/mark-signature-doctemp.md) -- Specify the area in the PDF document where you want to collect the signatures of participants.
          - [Document Templates configurations](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/doc-template-configs.md) -- Use Document Templates configurations to generate table of contents and page numbers on a PDF document that is generated from an HTML template.
            - [Create a TOC configuration in Document Templates](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/doc-template-configs.md) -- Use Document Templates configurations to generate table of contents and page numbers on a PDF document that is generated from an HTML template.
            - [Create a page number configuration in Document Templates](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/doc-template-configs.md) -- Use Document Templates configurations to generate table of contents and page numbers on a PDF document that is generated from an HTML template.
        - [Using Document Templates](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/using-doc-templates.md) -- Learn how to use Document Templates.
          - [Using Document Templates: HR Service Delivery](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/understanding-doc-templates.md) -- Learn how to use Document Templates along with the HR Service Delivery application.
            - [Document tasks generation](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/task-mapped-participants.md) -- Document tasks can be generated either automatically or manually. The tasks get generated in the order defined for the participants.
          - [Using Document Templates: Custom use case](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/doc-temp-gen.md) -- Understand how to use Document Templates outside of HR Service Delivery.
          - [Working on a document task](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/work-doctemp-tasks.md) -- Complete your document tasks from Employee Center.
            - [Fill and sign a PDF document](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/fill-sign-document.md) -- Complete your document task by filling in the required details and submitting the PDF document.
            - [Sign an HTML document](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/sign-html-document.md) -- Complete your document task by signing and generating a PDF copy of the HTML document.
            - [Review a PDF document](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/review-doctemp-task.md) -- Complete your document task by reviewing a PDF document. Send your review comments to one or more participants who are working on the document.
            - [Resubmit a PDF document](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/resubmit-doctemp-task.md) -- Complete your document task by incorporating the reviewer's suggestions.
          - [Using Guided Tours in Document Templates](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/guided-tours-doc-temp.md) -- Use Guided Tours in Document Templates to get instructions on how to create a document template.
        - [Reference for Document Templates](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/reference-doc-templates.md) -- Reference topics provide additional information about Document Templates.
          - [Components installed with Document Templates](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/reference-doc-templates.md) -- Reference topics provide additional information about Document Templates.
        - [Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs) on Document Templates](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/dc-faq.md) -- Find answers to some common questions on Document Templates.
      - [HR e-signature](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/hr-e-signature.md) -- Sign electronic documents from any desktop or mobile device with e-signature. E-signature is a scoped application that enables users to sign managed documents, knowledge articles, or HR document templates with their typed or drawn e-signature, their credentials, or as an acknowledgment.
        - [Select an HR document template for an e-signature task](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/select-hr-document-template-for-e-signature-task.md) -- If the document type of the e-signature template you are using is an HR document template, then you must select the HR document template that the signatory will sign on the HR case form.
        - [Migrate HR templates and open tasks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/migrate-existing-tasks-to-scoped-e-signature.md) -- Migrate existing HR task templates and open HR tasks to the new HR task type for e-signature with the Migrate HR e-signature tasks scheduled job. The scheduled job automatically updates the HR task type and e-signature template based on your existing configurations. It also disables the old HR task types for credential, e-signature, and sign document.
      - [Migrating from HR Document Templates to Document Templates](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/migration-hrdt-dt.md) -- Review these guidelines to successfully migrate from HR Document Templates to Document Templates. Document Templates provides the latest experience of HR Document Templates functionality with additional features and capabilities.
        - [Migrate HR Document template (HTML) to Document Template](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/migration-hrdt-dt.md) -- Review these guidelines to successfully migrate from HR Document Templates to Document Templates. Document Templates provides the latest experience of HR Document Templates functionality with additional features and capabilities.
        - [Migrate HR Document template (PDF) to Document Template](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/hr-service-delivery/migration-hrdt-dt.md) -- Review these guidelines to successfully migrate from HR Document Templates to Document Templates. Document Templates provides the latest experience of HR Document Templates functionality with additional features and capabilities.
    - [Agent Workspace](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/agent-ws-hr-case-mgmt-landing-page.md) -- Agent Workspace for HR Case Management (Configurable) is one of two workspaces available for the HR Service Delivery application and uses the Next Experience user interface. It is built on a configurable UI Builder version, which makes it easy to configure and extend according to business needs.
      - [Exploring Agent Workspace for HR Case Management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/agent-ws-hr-case-mgmt-exploring.md) -- Use Agent Workspace for HR Case Management to manage your employee HR requests from one place.

      - [Setting up Agent Workspace for HR Case Management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/setup-configurable-hr-agent-workspace.md) -- Set up Agent Workspace for HR Case Management so that your agents can engage with your employees, answer questions, create cases, and resolve issues.
        - [Agent Workspace for HR Case Management Guided Setup](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/hr-agent-ws-guided-setup.md) -- The Guided Setup enables you to configure Agent Workspace for HR Case Management for your agents so that they can access HR cases, tasks and communications all from one location.
        - [Install Agent Workspace for HR Case Management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/install-configurable-hr-agent-ws.md) -- Install Agent Workspace for HR Case Management (com.sn_hr_agent_ws) from the ServiceNow Store.
        - [RCA approvals in Agent Workspace for HR Case Management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/run-fix-scripts-aw.md) -- After you install or upgrade to the latest Agent Workspace for HR Case Management from ServiceNow Store, you might encounter Restricted Caller Access (RCA) approval messages in the HR Agent Workspace.
        - [UI Builder for Agent Workspace for HR Case Management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/uib-aws.md) -- Use UI Builder to build pages in Agent Workspace for HR Case Management using Next Experience and custom web components.
          - [Create a landing page variant](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/configure-report-aws.md) -- Create a variant of your landing page to build a custom portal experience for your users.
            - [Landing page configuration example](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/landing-page-example.md) -- Learn how to configure a landing page through an example configuration process.
          - [Enable a detailed data display within a report](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/drill-down-report.md) -- Enable users to visualize a subset of report data.
          - [Configure quick links in Agent Workspace for HR Case Management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/quick-links-aws.md) -- Configure quick links to quickly access internal and external resources related to specific departments within your organization.
          - [Reorder the navigation pane modules in HR Agent Workspace](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/reorder-pane-modules-aws.md) -- Quickly access the navigation pane modules in HR Agent Workspace. For example, Home, List, Inbox, and so on.
        - [Page configurations](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/page-configurations.md) -- Use Page configurations in Agent Workspace for HR Case Management to provide a customized experience for your users.
      - [Using Agent Workspace for HR Case Management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/agent-ws-hr-case-mgmt-use.md) -- As an HR agent, use the Agent Workspace for HR Case Management to interact with employees, respond to inquiries, and resolve issues.
        - [Lists in Agent Workspace for HR Case Management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/hr-agent-ws-lists.md) -- Lists are an easy way of accessing cases under various categories. For example, you can quickly get a list of HR cases in lifecycle events or cases related to payroll.
          - [Create My Lists](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/hr-agent-ws-create-list.md) -- Use My Lists to create a custom list of HR cases that you can readily access and start working on.
        - [Create a case in Agent Workspace for HR Case Management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/agent-ws-configurable-hr-create-case.md) -- Create a new HR case in Agent Workspace for HR Case Management.
          - [Enhance search criteria](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/enhance-case-search.md) -- Narrow the search criteria by specifying the column against which you want users to be searched. When an HR agent searches for a user while creating a case, provide more accurate search results.
        - [Create a task for a case using Agent Workspace for HR Case Management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/agent-ws-hr-case-mgmt-task.md) -- Choose a task type when creating a task within a case. When assigning the task to an employee on Employee Center, you can also request how the employee acknowledges completion of that task.
          - [Using checklists in HR Service Delivery Agent Workspace](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/agent-ws-hr-checklists.md) -- Creating and using checklists on an HR case or task helps you resolve issues faster, more efficiently, and with fewer errors.
        - [Agent Workspace for HR Case Management contextual side panel](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/agent-ws-hr-case-mgmt-context-sidebar.md) -- The contextual side panel in Agent Workspace for HR Case Management provides information designed to help you work an HR case and interact with your employees.
          - [Using At a Glance in Agent Workspace for HR Case Management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/agent-ws-hr-case-mgmt-youremp.md) -- Use the At a Glance feature from the contextual side panel to quickly view HR profile information for the Opened for person on an HR case enabling HR agents to better assist and resolve employee requests.
            - [Configure the At a Glance panel](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/hr-agent-ws-config-ataglance.md) -- Customize which employee information appears in the At a Glance panel by adding or removing fields from the Employee Details and Contacts sections.
          - [Using checklists in Agent Workspace for HR Case Management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/agent-ws-hr-case-mgmt-checklist.md) -- Creating and using checklists on an HR case or task helps you resolve issues faster, more efficiently, and with fewer errors.
          - [Response templates in Agent Workspace for HR Case Management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/hr-agent-ws-response-template.md) -- Response templates provide you with information on resolving an HR case or HR task or how to help an employee making an inquiry.
            - [Using a Response template in an HR case or HR task record](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/hr-agent-ws-using-response-template.md) -- Use response templates as reusable messages that you can copy and paste into the comments or work notes for an HR case or task.
            - [Using a Response template in chat](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/hr-agent-ws-chat-response-template.md) -- Use response templates as reusable messages that you can copy and paste into a chat.
            - [Using a Response template in an email](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/hr-agent-ws-email-response-template.md) -- Use response templates as reusable messages that you can copy and paste into an email.
          - [Add personal notes](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/add-pn-aws.md) -- Personal notes allow agents to record information that remains private and is not visible to other agents working on that case.
          - [Use recommended actions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/guided-decision-tree-aws.md) -- Provides real‑time, actionable guidance, and relevant resources that help HR agents speed up case resolution.
        - [Using the More icon in Agent Workspace for HR Case Management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/hr-agent-ws-more-icon.md) -- You can use the More icon more icon from Agent Workspace for HR Case Management to perform many duties related to working on an HR case.
          - [Create a reminder in Agent Workspace for HR Case Management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/hr-agent-ws-reminder.md) -- You can create reminders from an HR case or task to receive an intimation which will allow you to follow up by a specific date. Reminders enable timely communication and make sure that the actions are taken.
          - [Creating a case from an HR case](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/hr-agent-ws-add-case.md) -- Create additional cases directly from the HR case you are working on in the Agent Workspace for HR Case Management.
          - [Transfer a case in Agent Workspace for HR Case Management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/hr-agent-ws-transfer-case.md) -- Many cases are created as a General Inquiry case. After researching the employee's needs, you can transfer an existing case to a different HR service.
          - [Copy a case in Agent Workspace for HR Case Management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/copy-case-hr.md) -- Create a copy of a case to auto-populate the case values without having to fill in the fields manually.
          - [Escalating a case in Agent Workspace for HR Case Management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/hr-agent-ws-escalate-case.md) -- Escalate an HR case when you are unable to resolve an issue and must amplify the importance of a case.
          - [Secure documents](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/add-document-aws.md) -- Add an extra layer of security on documents that are linked to a case. Grant access to documents with sensitive or private data to groups, users, user criteria or roles.
          - [Report a knowledge gap from a case in Agent Workspace for HR Case Management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/knowledge-gap-aws.md) -- Report a knowledge gap for a case to get a documented resolution for common HR cases.
            - [View assigned knowledge tasks in Agent Workspace for HR Case Management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/knowledge-task-aws.md) -- View your assigned knowledge tasks in Agent Workspace for HR Case Management when a knowledge gap is reported in a case.
        - [Add adhoc approvers to an HR case in the Agent Workspace for HR Case Management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/add-approvers.md) -- Provide your agents with the flexibility to add adhoc approvers to a case that is part of an HR service.
        - [Templates in Agent Workspace for HR Case Management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/hr-agent-ws-templates.md) -- Create consistent recurring documents by developing templates using Document Templates and use them in a generic workflow in Agent Workspace for HR Case Management.
          - [Create and sign document tasks in Agent Workspace for HR Case Management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/hr-agent-ws-create-temp.md) -- Create document tasks directly in the Agent Workspace for HR Case Management using document templates and sign them off from Agent Workspace.
          - [Edit an HTML document](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/agent-edit-document-ws.md) -- Support rendering values of variables, scripts, and blocks in edit mode in Preview Document. View the content of variables, scripts, or blocks rather than only viewing the variable or block names.
        - [Generate a summary report](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/define-summary.md) -- Create and save as many templates as needed by using the ServiceNow Document Templates application. Create a summary report by selecting a document template for the report. Export the case details, in a PDF format, for documenting and sharing purposes.
        - [Sending an email in Agent Workspace for HR Case Management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/send-email-aws.md) -- Send any communication related to HR cases with attached documents using the Send email feature. Minimise typing errors by auto-populating the email address of the subject person (of the case) in the email.
          - [Send an email notification after reassignment](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/hr-agent-ws-email-reassignment.md) -- After you reassign an agent to an HR case, you can send an email to notify the agent.
        - [Using interactions in Agent Workspace for HR Case Management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/hr-agent-ws-interactions.md) -- Use interaction records to create an HR case or reference employee information to decide to create a case or request from different types of employee communications.

        - [Lifecycle event cases in Agent Workspace for HR Case Management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/hr-agent-ws-lifecycle.md) -- Manage lifecycle event cases using Agent Workspace for HR Case Management.
          - [Create a lifecycle event case using Agent Workspace for HR Case Management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/hr-agent-ws-create-ls.md) -- There are multiple ways to create a Lifecycle Event case.
        - [Using the activity stream in Agent Workspace for HR Case Management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/hr-agent-ws-activity-stream.md) -- Use the activity stream section of Agent Workspace for HR Case Management to document work notes (private) or comments, respond to email, or view the state of the HR case.
        - [Machine learning solutions in Agent Workspace for HR Case Management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/hr-agent-ws-ml-solutions.md) -- Use machine learning solutions to auto determine the correct HR service and assignment group for cases in Agent Workspace for HR Case Management.
          - [Auto determination of HR service in Agent Workspace for HR Case Management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/hr-agent-ws-auto-hrservice.md) -- Auto determine the correct HR service for a case in Agent Workspace for HR Case Management. Enable an HR agent to transfer the case to the appropriate HR service rather than having to spend significant time manually triaging cases to appropriate HR services.
          - [Auto determination of assignment group in Agent Workspace for HR Case Management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/hr-agent-ws-auto-assign-grp.md) -- Auto determine the assignment group for a case in Agent Workspace for HR Case Management. Enable an HR agent to transfer the case to the correct assignment group rather than having to spend significant time manually identifying groups for the HR cases.
          - [Display similar closed cases in Agent Workspace for HR Case Management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/hr-agent-ws-similar-closed-case.md) -- Help an HR agent resolve the current case by displaying similar closed cases.
        - [Working with approvers for a case in Agent Workspace for HR Case Management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/hr-agent-ws-approvers.md) -- HR cases can be set up to require approvals before it can progress to completion.

          - [View approval history in Agent Workspace for HR Case Management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/view-approval-history.md) -- Review the approval history in the activity stream. The employee document repository provides a central repository for quick and easy identification of documents using different sorting features.
        - [E-signature in Agent Workspace for HR Case Management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/hr-agent-ws-esign.md) -- When working on an HR case or HR task, you can use e-signature to sign documents that require signatures.

Requesters can initiate HR support conversations through SMS.

          - [Review users in a user segment group](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/manage-group-aws.md) -- After creating a user group segment, review and edit users before you create cases.
        - [HR Walk-up](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/hr-walkup.md) -- The HR Walk-up feature offers a convenient and efficient way for users to seek immediate assistance and support for their HR-related issues.           - [Use HR walk-up](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/hr-walkup.md) -- The HR Walk-up feature offers a convenient and efficient way for users to seek immediate assistance and support for their HR-related issues.         - [HR Triaging Dashboard](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/agent-workspace-for-hr-case-management/hr-triaging-dashboard.md) -- The HR Triaging Dashboard enables you to review your teams' case assignments in a layout where cases are displayed as cards. This layout enables easy movement of case cards between lanes, enabling you to review and reassign cases by auto-updating HR service, or user, or priority.

This layout enables easy movement of case cards between lanes, enabling you to review and reassign cases by auto-updating HR service, or user, or priority.

HR agents can use this time to complete their work before moving on to assist other customers.

    - [Alumni Center](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/alumni-center/alumni-service-center.md) -- The Alumni Center is your dedicated hub to stay connected with the organization after your tenure.
      - [Explore](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/alumni-center/asc-explore.md) -- Use the Alumni Center to discover resources that keep you connected, update your profile, access HR services, stay informed with company news, and browse job listings.
        - [Alumni profile](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/alumni-center/alumni-profile.md) -- Update your personal details and maintain your employment history in your Alumni profile.
        - [Alumni job opportunities](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/alumni-center/alumni-job-opportunities.md) -- Discover job opportunities tailored to your skills and interests, and explore roles that align with your experience.
      - [Configure](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/alumni-center/asc-configure.md) -- Set up your Alumni Center so you can communicate with your former employees or non-employees.
        - [Configure alumni creation](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/alumni-center/configure-alumni-creation.md) -- As an admin, use the various configurable methods to enable seamless employee-to-alumni transition.
        - [Properties](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/alumni-center/asc-properties.md) -- Use properties to control the behavior of the Alumni Center.
        - [Add an import set](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/alumni-center/asc-add-import-set.md) -- Use System Import Sets to upload your file of alumni.
        - [Edit staged users](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/alumni-center/asc-staged-users.md) -- Use Staged Alumni to ensure the import set upload and transform process ran correctly. It also ensures that your uploaded alumni are configured with the correct user ID.
