          - [Enhanced Requests Experience](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/my-requests-update-intro.md) -- Improve your request management on Employee Center with the Enhanced Requests Experience that enables you to find and manage requests effectively.
            - [Set up request sources](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/config-request-sources.md) -- Create different request sources for different applications to see all your requests under the Requests section on Employee Center.
            - [Set up the Requests filter definition](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/request-filter-def.md) -- Configure a filter definition for different portals or each portal separately with the Requests filter definition.
            - [Set up the Requests filter configuration](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/setup-req-filter-config.md) -- Set up the request filter configuration to determine the filter options are available under the Requests tabs.
            - [Set up the Requests filter condition](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/setup-req-filter-con.md) -- Set up the filter conditions to provide a second-level filter options for the first-level filters.
            - [Opt in to the enhanced Enhanced Requests Experience](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/opt-in-emre.md) -- Opt in to the Enhanced Requests Experience, as an existing customer, to get the benefits of the updated features on both desktop and on the Now Mobile app.
          - [Employee requests page](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/employee-center-requests-page-configuration.md) -- The requests page is where employees can view all their requests on a single page in the Employee Center. You can configure the requests page by applying filters to show a user's service catalog requests, IT incidents, HR cases, and more.
            - [Create or modify a request filter](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/configure-ec-requests-page-filters.md) -- Create or modify a request filter for the requests page in the Employee Center.
          - [My active items widget configuration](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/my-activity-config.md) -- The My active items widget displays all user activity that requires your input or review.
            - [Perform a basic activity configuration](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/configure-my-basic-activity.md) -- Configure activities to determine which records you want to retrieve from a table when certain conditions are met.
              - [Provide basic activity configuration details](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/provide-activity-config-details.md) -- After you create a basic activity configuration, you must specify which records for the activity you want to retrieve from the tables.
            - [Perform an advanced activity configuration](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/configure-my-activity.md) -- Configure activities to display their count and to display items in a list for a primary activity.

            - [Modify Active items widget display](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/config-my-activity-instance-options.md) -- You can configure the instance options to control the appearance of the widget, such as the title, number of topics, display size, and border color.
          - [Notifications for Employee Center](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/notifications-ec.md) -- Notifications for Employee Center functionality provides a unified notifications experience on the portal for different tasks, activities, and other relevant information.
            - [Configure notifications for portal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/config-notification-ec.md) -- Configure the notifications functionality on any portal of your choice to get a unified notification system for all your tasks and reminders.
            - [Configure notification content for portal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/config-notif-content.md) -- Configure the notification display messages for each notification type on the Employee Center portal.
            - [Configure notification triggers](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/setup-notif-content-triggers.md) -- Configure the notification content triggers to determine how it’s displayed on the portal.

            - [Employee to-dos approval roles](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-to-do-approval-roles.md) -- Roles determine who can approve, reject, or comment on employee requests.
            - [Create or modify to-dos](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/configure-to-dos-page-filters.md) -- Create or modify a to-dos in the Employee Center.
            - [Enable prioritization by filter](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-prioritize-to-dos-filters.md) -- If you are ordering the to-dos by filter instead of due date, you must enable the sn_hr_sp.todos_config_display_with_priority property, add the Display priority field to the to-dos configuration form, and assign each to-dos filter a priority number.
          - [Configurable task filters](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/configurable-filters-experience-employee.md) -- Enable the employee to use filters, filter groups, and categories to easily filter, discover, and fulfill the tasks in a few clicks.
            - [Configure filter conditions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/configure-to-dos-tasks-filter-category.md) -- With these conditions, you enable employees to easily filter, discover, and fulfill the tasks in a few clicks.
            - [Create filters or filter groups](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/configure-to-dos-tasks-filters.md) -- With these filters and filter groups, you enable employees to easily filter, organize, discover, and fulfill the tasks in a few clicks.

              - [Overview section form](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/profile-overview-section-form.md) -- The overview section form enables you to configure a section on the Employee Profile UI.
              - [User Criteria output](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/user-criteria-output.md) -- User Criteria output based on Available For and Not Available For values.

You can configure the instance options to control the number of tabs to display.
            - [Update the Employee Profile banner and profile images](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/update-employee-profile-banner-and-profile-images.md) -- Upload or update the banner and profile images for your Employee Profile page with the upgraded edit features.

            - [Configure Employee Profile for a portal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/create-portal-profile-config.md) -- Configure the Employee Profile for a portal by creating a configuration record and mapping a header and tabs.
              - [Employee Profile form](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/employee-profile-fieldconfig.md) -- An option in the Employee Profile configuration that provides a list of employee profile fields.
              - [Employee Profile portal configuration form](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/profile-portal-config-form.md) -- Use the Employee Profile Portal Configuration form to configure the profile for a service portal.
              - [Employee Profile upgrade scenarios](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/emp-profile-upgrade.md) -- After upgrading Employee Profile to version 11.0.3, the profile pages on all portals are updated based on the following scenarios.
            - [Add other manager relationships for an employee](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/add-other-manager-relationship.md) -- Add other manager relationships to set up dotted-line reporting for an employee.
            - [Add an Employee Profile page bio in the upgraded section](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/add-an-employee-profile-page-bio.md) -- Add a short bio comprising interesting details about yourself in the add a bio section of the Employee Profile page.
            - [Manage the employee profile AI and ML model](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/train-employee-profile-model.md) -- Use the employee profile Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Machine Learning (ML) model to view recommended articles and catalog items for similar users.
              - [Manually train the employee profile predictive model](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/manually-train-employee-profile-predictive-model.md) -- Manually train the employee profile predictive intelligence to model similar users if auto-train is not enabled by default.
            - [Updates for the Employee Profile HR widget](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/updates-for-the-employee-profile-hr-widget.md) -- The Employee Profile HR widget has three additions, My Contacts, My Delegates, and Employee Documents.
            - [Preferences widget for Employee Profile](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/preferences-widget.md) -- User Preferences can be accessed as a separate Preferences widget for customers who have opted in for the Employee Profile.
        - [Quick start tests for Employee Center](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/quick-start-tests-employee-center.md) -- Validate the continued functionality of the Employee Center after any configuration change such as an upgrade or after developing an application. Copy and customize these quick start tests to pass when using your instance-specific data.
          - [Run quick start tests for Employee Center](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/atf-employee-center.md) -- Employee Center provides several quick start tests you can run.
      - [Using Employee Center](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/using-emp-center.md) -- Use the Employee Center portal to raise requests, work on to-dos, and search for information.
        - [Use the Employee Center topic pages](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-topic-use.md) -- The Employee Center topic pages contain the breadcrumbs widget, topic header widget, sub-topic widget, and the topic content widget.
        - [Topic managers and contributors for topic page management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/topic-managers-and-contributors-for-topic-page-management.md) -- While topic managers control the topic level decisions, the contributors manage the connected content, quick links, adding applications, and featured content on the topic page.
        - [Use the My To-dos page](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-to-dos-use.md) -- Use the To-dos page to review all tasks that are assigned to you and prioritize them.
        - [Use approval experience](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-to-dos-use-approval-hub.md) -- Use the My tasks section to track and fulfill the requests from the portal and Now Mobile.
        - [Manage approvals from Microsoft Teams](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/va-concur-ec.md) -- Manage Concur expense approvals using Virtual Agent actionable notifications in Microsoft Teams to resolve the approval directly in the Virtual Agent conversation without involving a live agent.
        - [Manage approvals from a Microsoft Outlook email](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/oam-concur-ec.md) -- Approve or reject Concur expense reports from a Microsoft Outlook email message.
        - [Task filters on My tasks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/configurable-filters-experience.md) -- Use the enhanced filters experience to manage and prioritize the tasks.         - [View the Recommended for you content](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/rfy-employee.md) -- Access all the content recommended for you from from a central location in one-click.

        - [Employee Profile org chart widget](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/view-org-chart.md) -- Use the Employee Profile org chart widget to easily browse, search, and navigate through the organization chart.

        - [Manage favorites](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/web-configure-favorites-employee.md) -- Mark the content as your favorites and easily access all your favorites.

        - [Employee Profile upgrade scenarios](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/emp-profile-upgrade.md) -- After upgrading Employee Profile to version 11.0.3, the profile pages on all portals are updated based on the following scenarios.
        - [Enhanced Requests Experience forms](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/req-concept-ec.md) -- The forms provide information to set up the Enhanced Requests Experience.

        - [External Link form](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/external-link-form.md) -- Use the External Link form to create an external link.

        - [Overview section form](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/profile-overview-section-form.md) -- The overview section form enables you to configure a section on the Employee Profile UI.
        - [Portal notification configuration form](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/portal-notif-config-form.md) -- The portal notification configurations form enables you to create a unified notification system for your preferred portal.
        - [Portal notification content form](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/notif-content-form.md) -- The field descriptions provided here are required to configure your portal notification messages.
        - [Trigger conditions form](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/notif-trigger-form.md) -- The field descriptions provided here are essential to create the trigger conditions for your portal notification messages.
        - [Quick Link form](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-quick-link-form.md) -- Use the Quick Link form to create a new quick link and specify the content type for the quick link.
        - [Tab widget mapping form](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/tab-widget-mapping-form.md) -- You can use the tab widget mapping form to display widgets on a tab and control their visibility.
        - [Taxonomy form](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/taxonomy-form.md) -- Use the taxonomy form to create your own taxonomy for the Employee Center portal.

        - [User Criteria form](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-user-criteria-form.md) -- Add a user criteria record to decide which users, roles, and groups can access a quick link.
        - [User Criteria output](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/user-criteria-output.md) -- User Criteria output based on Available For and Not Available For values.
        - [Schedule appointment form](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/schedule-appointment-form.md) -- Use the Schedule appointment form to select a reason and provide contact information for your appointment.
        - [Location Consent form](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/location-consent-form.md) -- The location consent form helps you configure the communication channels for appointment bookings.
        - [Website configuration form](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/config-website-form.md) -- The field descriptions provide a point of reference when you're configuring the Browser Extension for Employee Center for a website.
    - [Employee Center for IT Service Management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/itsm-ec-landing.md) -- Employee Center for IT Service Management (ITSM) helps you improve the self-service capabilities and perform diverse admin and service management tasks from a dynamic unified employee portal.
      - [Exploring Employee Center for ITSM](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/explore-itsm-ec.md) -- Empower users with the operational efficiencies gained from greater self-service, actionable communications, and unified experiences.
      - [Configuring Employee Center for ITSM](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/config-itsm-ec-new.md) -- Leverage Employee Center for ITSM to provide an integrated and seamless experience to the employees, agents, and service managers.
      - [Using Employee Center for ITSM](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/use-itsm-ec-new.md) -- Use Employee Center for ITSM together to reduce costs, deliver high-quality customer and employee experiences, and drive operational resilience.
    - [Employee Center Pro](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/employee-center-pro-landing.md) -- Employee Center Pro expands the portal experience beyond service delivery with employee communication and engagement tools including content publishing, campaigns, and employee communities.
      - [Exploring Employee Center Pro](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/emp-center-vs-ec-pro.md) -- Employee Center Pro is a modern, multi-department employee destination site to drive employee engagement and productivity.
      - [Configuring Employee Center Pro](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/configuring-employee-center-pro.md) -- Guidance for setting up Employee Center Pro.
        - [Admin configurations](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/configure-ecpro-portal.md) -- As the system admin, install Employee Center Pro plugins, assign roles to users so they can configure Employee Center Pro features, set the theme, header, and footer, and enable support for right-to-left languages.
          - [Upgrading to Employee Center Pro](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/upgrade-steps.md) -- Guidance on preparing for and performing an upgrade from Employee Center to Employee Center Pro.
            - [Install Employee Center Pro](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/install-ec-pro.md) -- Employee Center Pro extends the standard Employee Center capabilities and provides a platform for employees to communicate and be engaged.
            - [Upgrade to Employee Center Pro from Employee Service Center (HR)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/migrate-esc-ec.md) -- Migrate to the Employee Center Pro portal to provide employees with a unified portal and content experiences.
          - [Employee Center Pro plugins](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ecpro-plugins.md) -- Discover the Employee Center Pro plugins that are included out-of-the-box on a new ServiceNow instance, as well as plugins that are installed when you upgrade to Employee Center Pro.
            - [Activate Content Experiences](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/activate-content-automation-plugin.md) -- You can activate the Content Experiences [sn_ca] plugin if you have the admin role to deliver targeted content and campaigns to keep employees informed and engaged. This plugin includes demo data and activates related plugins if they are not already active.
            - [Activate Content engagement](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/installing-content-engagement.md) -- You can activate the Content Engagement [sn_ce] plugin if you have the admin role to enable employee engagement activities (reaction icons, comments, or sharing content) with portal and mobile content.
            - [Activate Content Publishing](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/activate-content-delivery-plugin.md) -- Activate the Content Publishing [sn_cd] to create and distribute engaging employee content. This plugin includes demo data and activates related plugins if they are not already active. To use the Employee Communities feature, activate the Customer Communities [com.sn_customer_communities] plugin.
            - [Activate Content Governance](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-install-content-gov.md) -- You can install the Content Governance application (sn_cg) to provide a streamlined method for employees to request content to be created for Content Publishing.
          - [Employee Center Pro roles](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ecpro-roles.md) -- Employee Center Pro plugins include necessary roles for configuring and using the features. Learn more about the roles and the tasks they can perform.
          - [Enhanced chat in Employee Center](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/nass-now-assissist-self-service.md) -- Learn more about the theme updates and how to get started with Now Assist enhanced chat.
        - [Setup search experience](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/setup-search-experience.md) -- Enhance the search experience.
          - [AI Search for Curated Experiences](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/align-search-for-curated-exp.md) -- Align the AI search to limit the search to the content associated with your taxonomy.
            - [Improved search functionality](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/topic-facets.md) -- The improved global search provides narrowed down content browsing on the global search for quicker and more specific content browsing experience.
              - [Configure search by the topic facets](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/config-facets.md) -- Configure the search by the topic facets, which suits your organizational requirements.
            - [Configure search source when AI search is disabled](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/config-search-source.md) -- In Employee Center, the AI search is enabled by default. In situations where the AI search is disabled, you can configure a search source from which to fetch search results.
            - [Configure search navigation tabs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/config-search-nav-tabs.md) -- In Employee Center, the AI search navigation tabs are enabled by default. You can configure a search navigation tab on the search results.
            - [Configure click-rank search relevance](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/config-topic-search-relevance.md) -- Enhance the topic page search rank based on the clicks and usage of a topic by the employees.
            - [Configure topic search filter](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/config-portal-search-filters.md) -- Customize search experiences for different portals by configuring the search application and filters.​
        - [Setup task management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ecpro-setup-task-management.md) -- Enhance employee productivity and drive portal consolidation.
          - [My active items widget configuration](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/my-activity-config.md) -- The My active items widget displays all user activity that requires your input or review.
            - [Perform a basic activity configuration](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/configure-my-basic-activity.md) -- Configure activities to determine which records you want to retrieve from a table when certain conditions are met.
              - [Provide basic activity configuration details](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/provide-activity-config-details.md) -- After you create a basic activity configuration, you must specify which records for the activity you want to retrieve from the tables.
            - [Perform an advanced activity configuration](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/configure-my-activity.md) -- Configure activities to display their count and to display items in a list for a primary activity.
            - [Restrict access to an activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/grant-restrict-activity-access.md) -- Apply user criteria to an activity to define which users, groups, and roles can access the activity.
            - [Modify Active items widget display](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/config-my-activity-instance-options.md) -- You can configure the instance options to control the appearance of the widget, such as the title, number of topics, display size, and border color.
          - [Approvals hub](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/approval-hub-intro.md) -- Enable the approver with the in-context information for informed and prioritized approval decisions.
            - [Enable task configuration for approvals](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/approval-hub-to-dos-page-filters.md) -- Provide the approvers with more in-context information about the approval requests for informed and prioritized approval workflows.
            - [Approval hub integrations](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/approvals-int-concept.md) -- The Approval Hub integration with different external applications enable different access points to fulfill organizational approval tasks.
              - [Approvals hub integration with SAP Concur](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/x-concur-sa-integration.md) -- Enable easier access to all active approvals of external business applications such as SAP Concur from Employee Center Pro. The SAP Concur spoke is built by Bristlecone, Inc.
                - [Manage approvals from SAP Concur](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/x-concur-approvals.md) -- As an administrator, you can sync, view, track, and fulfill the requests from other business applications such as SAP Concur from a unified Employee Center Pro location.
                - [Populate SAP Concur report and metadata](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/x-concur-approvals-scheduled-job.md) -- As an administrator, fetch the reports metadata from other business applications such as SAP Concur. View the Concur expense reports, itemizations, and receipts from your ServiceNow instance.
                - [Use task configuration for SAP Concur approvals](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/approval-hub-to-dos-page-concur.md) -- Using the default To-dos configuration, you can provide the approvers with more in-context information about the approval requests for better approval workflows.
              - [Approvals hub integration with Workday](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/wd-ec-integration.md) -- Enable easier access to all active approvals of external business applications such as Workday from Employee Center Pro. The Workday spoke is built by Bristlecone, Inc.
                - [Fetch Workday reports](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/wd-ec-approvals-scheduled-job.md) -- As an administrator, fetch the reports metadata from other business applications such as Workday. View the Workday reports, leaves, compensation, and other information from your ServiceNow instance.
                - [Configure Workday to-dos](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/config-workday-raas-report.md) -- Store one-time configuration parameters to pull tasks from Workday into the ServiceNow application.
                - [Use task configuration for Workday approvals](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/wd-approval-hub-to-dos-page.md) -- Using the default To-dos configuration, you can provide the approvers with more in-context information about the approval requests for better approval workflows.
            - [Configure E-signature for approvals](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/esignature-for-approvals.md) -- Approval with e-Signature plugin (com.glide.e_signature_approvals) enables users to approve requests by authenticating their login credentials.
          - [App Launcher](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/web-application-employee-about.md) -- App Launcher enables you to provide employees one-click access to all of their web business applications from Employee Center.
            - [Sync your applications from Microsoft Entra ID](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/web-applications-azure.md) -- As an administrator, you can sync your single-sign-on applications and give one-click access to the applications. You can associate topics to the applications to launch useful applications right from the portal.
            - [App launcher integration with Okta](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/web-applications-okta.md) -- Using OOTB integration with Okta, you can automatically sync the registered applications from Okta and give your employees one–click access to a personalized list of assigned applications. Your employees can easily access all the active apps with valid entitlement in Okta without specifying the login credentials.
            - [Register custom web applications with app launcher](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/web-applications-custom.md) -- As an administrator, you can register applications manually and give one-click access to the applications. You can associate topics to the applications to discover and launch useful applications from the topic page.
            - [Configure application visibility and access](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/applauncher-enable-availability.md) -- Enhance application discovery and navigation on the App launcher by configuring the access and visibility settings.
            - [Assign topics to web applications](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/web-applications-topic-assignment.md) -- Associate topics to the applications which can help discover and launch useful applications right from topic page.
            - [Modify app launcher widget display](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/use-app-launcher.md) -- Access all the useful applications from a unified application from the Applications widget from your employee portal. You can see a list of related applications when you browse topics and launch the application.
            - [App launcher user experience analytics](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/web-applauncher-analytics.md) -- Visually analyze app usage, user behavior, and other information from the user experience dashboard.
          - [Organization chart in Employee Center Pro](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/employee-profile-org-chart.md) -- Using org chart, learn more about other employees and understand team structures at the organization.
            - [Configure eligible users for org chart](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/config-eligible-users-orgchart.md) -- Define the eligible users to show up in the org chart. Admin can create a new eligible user configuration from one of the Users, HR Profile, and Employee Profile tables.
            - [Configure card settings for org chart](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ecpro-new-org-chart-card-config.md) -- Define the lines and information to show on the Employee Center Pro org chart card.
            - [Update the report count based on eligible users](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/update-report-count.md) -- Update the direct and other report count by running a script execution job.
            - [Modify the org chart widget display](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/config-orgchart-instanceoptions.md) -- The org chart widget displays the employees and organization hierarchy. You can configure the instance options to control the number of employees.
        - [Appointment Booking](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/appointment-booking.md) -- Provide an omnichannel unified experience to your employees to schedule and manage appointments across multiple business units such as IT support, HR consultations, or other business units.
          - [Opt in to unified appointment booking](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/opt-in-apt-booking.md) -- Opt in to unified appointment booking and enable it for the Employee Center.
          - [Create an appointment reason](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/create-apt-reason.md) -- Create a reason that employees can use to book an appointment.
          - [Configure appointment communication](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/configure-appt-comms.md) -- Configure the communication channels and location consent for appointment bookings.
          - [Map category and reasons to a location](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/map-apt-category-reasons.md) -- Use the Unified Taxonomy for Employee Center to create appointment categories to group appointment reasons and map them to location queues.
          - [Configure feedback for appointment booking](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/config-fdbck-appt-booking.md) -- Create a feedback definition for appointment booking so employees can provide feedback for completed appointments.
          - [Configure page routing for appointment booking](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/config-page-route-apt-booking.md) -- Configure page routing to redirect users to the appointment scheduling page.
        - [Setup employee communications](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/setup-employee-comms.md) -- Inform and engage your employees.
          - [Content engagement](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-content-engagement.md) -- Content engagement enhances news articles by providing users with a way to comment and react to articles and for managers to measure the effectiveness of their content using engagement metrics.
            - [Configure a custom reaction](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ce-configure-reaction.md) -- Content engagement utilizes font awesome icons to provide several out-of-the-box reactions for employees to interact with news articles. Engagement admins can customize the out-of-the-box reactions or configure their own.
            - [Smart prioritization](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-smart-prioritization-content.md) -- Smart prioritization uses a numeric priority score to automatically rank AI content, such as Employee Hub and AIUX Portal content types, for each content schedule.
          - [Video hosting integrations framework](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/content-providers.md) -- Connect Content Publishing with a video hosting service, to make the hosted videos available for content authoring and publishing.
            - [Configure content provider and mapping](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/configure-content-provider.md) -- Connect a video hosting service to Content Publishing by configuring a content provider, then mapping the hosting service to specific content types, including rich content, news article, and styled content.
            - [Configure a video authorization](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/configure-content-processor.md) -- Configure a content processor to enable employees to view private videos without providing credentials.
            - [Configure video content search](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/configure-content-search.md) -- Configure a content processor to add a button to the Content Library interface that enables a content manager to view thumbnails of available videos from the content provider.
            - [Configure content rendering parameter](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/configure-content-rendering-parameter.md) -- A content rendering parameter functions similarly to video hosting URL parameters, allowing content managers to customize the viewer's experience through an interface element in the Rich Content Editor. Depending on the hosting provider, this can include defining a checkbox for enabling full screen or autoplay, or a textbox for specifying the start time.
          - [Content templates](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-content-templates.md) -- Content templates empower content creators to efficiently publish large volumes of news articles. Each template defines the article layout, publishing schedule, destination, and target audience. By associating a news article with a content template, the system automatically generates publish plans, which reduces the effort required to publish content.
            - [Create a Content template](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-create-content-template.md) -- A content template is pre-defined publishing plan for news articles. Create a content template to enable content authors to create and publish higher volumes of news article content.
          - [Content Ownership](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ecpro-content-restriction.md) -- Define who has permission to create content, where they can publish it, and which employees can view it.
            - [Assign ownership of content](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ecpro-ca-cd-content-restriction.md) -- Assign a user or group with the content manager (sn_cd.content_manager) role to a content item so only that user or group can edit and publish the content.
            - [Assign ownership of an audience](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ecpro-ca-cd-audience-delegation.md) -- Provide ownership of an audience to a user or group with the content manager (sn_cd.content_manager) role so only they can access and schedule content for the audience.
            - [Assign ownership to a portal page](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ecpro-portal-page-restriction.md) -- Assign ownership of a portal page to give a user or group with the content manager (sn_cd.content_manager) role exclusive content publishing ability for the Content Publishing widgets in that page.
            - [Assign ownership to a topic](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ecpro-assign-ownership-topic.md) -- Assign ownership of a taxonomy topic to give a user or group with the content manager (sn_cd.content_manager) role exclusive content publishing ability for the Content Publishing widgets in that topic.
          - [Reusable components](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-re-usable-components.md) -- Use Re-usable components to create content
            - [Add content destination](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-add-content-destination.md) -- A content destination defines the page and widget for publishing news articles. It is a component of a content template, which auto-generates publish plans for new articles.
            - [Audiences](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ecpro-audience.md) -- Target portal content and lifecycle event activities to specified audiences with audience records.
              - [Create an audience](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-audiences.md) -- Create or modify an audience record to define the conditions or criteria that users must meet to view content.
            - [Create a content category](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-content-cat.md) -- Create a content category to tag news articles.
          - [Configure employee communications widgets](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/employee-comms-widgets.md) -- Modify the out-of-the-box widgets settings according to your organization's needs.
            - [Modify the Featured News widget](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/modify-featured-news-widget.md) -- The Featured News widget displays featured articles on company news and announcements.
            - [Modify the News feed widget](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/modify-news-feed-widget-display.md) -- The News feed widget displays articles on company news and announcements. All news, Other news, and Related news are instances of the News feed widget.
            - [Modify the Content Experiences widget](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ecpro-edit-cew.md) -- You can edit the banner of your Content Experiences widget to create a modern and unique layout for your content in the Content Experiences widget.
            - [Modify banner width options](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/change-default-width-of-employee-center-pro-home-page-banner.md) -- Modify the width of the Employee Center Pro banner widget, on the home page, to suit your preference.
          - [Configure Localization Framework for Content Publishing](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-int-localization-framework.md) -- Configure the translation workflow to enable Content managers to request translation via the Localization Framework. The basic workflow relies on manual translation; you can integrate with a third-party service to receive automatic translation.
            - [Configuring translation for Content Publishing after upgrade](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-multiple-language-support.md) -- Content Publishing supports multi-lingual content creation by enabling content managers to easily change the interface language and request content translation through the Localization Framework.
          - [Add or modify content type for Content Publishing](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ecpro-manage-content-types.md) -- Use Content Types to associate the content type category with a service portal widget to determine where content resides on your service portal.
        - [Setup continuous improvement](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/setup-continuous-improvement.md) -- Enhance efficiency and performance through feedback and analytics.
          - [Integrated experience and service feedback](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ex-fdback-ovrvw.md) -- Experience and service feedback enables you to gather quick feedback from your users on their user experiences and their service experiences.
            - [Set up the feedback configuration](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/config-employee-ex-fdbck.md) -- Set up the feedback configuration for the experience and service feedback in the Employee Center portal. Configure a seamless channel of feedback communication that remains constant for your portal.
            - [Set up the feedback definition](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/config-feedback-dfnition.md) -- Configure the feedback definition to curate the finer details of each feedback type.
            - [Configuring feedback for Virtual Agent](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/configuring-fdbck-va.md) -- You can promote the experience feedback or set up service feedback for the Virtual Agent.
              - [Promote experience feedback in Virtual Agent](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/configuring-fdbck-va.md) -- You can promote the experience feedback or set up service feedback for the Virtual Agent.
              - [Set up service feedback for Virtual Agent](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/configuring-fdbck-va.md) -- You can promote the experience feedback or set up service feedback for the Virtual Agent.
            - [Integrated service and experience feedback management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ex-fdbck-manage.md) -- Manage the experience and service feedback widgets according to your organizational need.
              - [Modify the experience flow feedback widget](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/modify-fdbck-widgets.md) -- Customize the appearance of the experience flow feedback widget with the instance options.
              - [Modify the workflow feedback widget](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/modify-wrkflw-widget.md) -- Customize the appearance of the workflow feedback widget with the instance options.
            - [Feedback Analytics dashboard](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ex-fdback-board.md) -- Track all your feedback responses with the Feedback Analytics for portals, email, Virtual Agent, kiosks, and Now Mobile.
              - [Usage Insights dashboard](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ued-ec.md) -- The Usage Insights dashboard helps get a consolidated view of the feedback data. It provides a quick view of all types of feedback data in the Usage Insights dashboard.
          - [Content Analytics](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ecpro-content-automation-analytics.md) -- Monitor and measure the impact of the content you provide through the Employee Center and in campaigns using Content Analytics.
            - [Activate Content Analytics](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/activate-content-analytics-plugin.md) -- Activate Content Analytics if you have an admin role to use the default analytics solution that provides web portal traffic analytics, as well as Content Experiences (aka Campaigns) related engagement statistics.
            - [Activate a tracking profile](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/activate-tracking-profile.md) -- Activate one of the out-of-the-box tracking profiles to start collecting portal and campaign metrics.
            - [Create a Content Analytics tracking profile](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ecpro-content-analytics-setup.md) -- Use Tracking Profiles to configure your ServiceNow content analytics dashboards.
            - [Set up Content Analytics tracking](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ecpro-content-analytics-tracking-setup.md) -- To use Content Analytics with custom pages or widgets, add the tracking profile to your Employee Center or service portal theme header and add the cdaAnalytics service to your custom widgets.
        - [Quick start tests for Employee Center Pro](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/quick-start-tests-employee-center-pro.md) -- Validate the continued functionality of Employee Center Pro after any configuration change such as an upgrade or after developing an application. Copy and customize these quick start tests to pass when using your instance-specific data.
        - [Managing portal performance](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/improve-manage.md) -- Discover ways to reduce portal loading time and enhance portal display.
          - [Portal performance optimization](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-load-experience-optimization.md) -- Learn more about the heavy-load and high-traffic scenarios and ways to optimize the user experience and portal performance.
          - [Improve portal load time with asynchronous loading](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/optimize-performance-of-employee-center-home-page.md) -- Reduce the time employees spend waiting for the portal to load by enabling widgets to load data asynchronously. This allows widgets to display information as it becomes available, improving overall portal performance.
          - [Improve the image load time on Employee Center](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/optimize-image-loading.md) -- Use CDN URLs to reduce the load time of the banner images, background images, and app icons on the Employee Center portal.
          - [View widget performance metrics](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/view-widget-performance-metrics.md) -- View the metrics provided by the performance window to identify which widgets take the longest to load data.
          - [Add hotspots to track custom widget performance](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/add-hotspots-track-custom-widget-performance.md) -- Hotspots help capture and log widget load times, which enables better debugging of long portal load times.
      - [Authoring and managing employee communications](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/manage-emp-center.md) -- Content managers and admins use Employee Center Pro capabilities to create employee communications, assemble multi-stage and multi-channel campaigns, manage content requests, and measure impact.
        - [Creating employee communications](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-publish-content.md) -- Content Publishing offers robust communications creation tools that enable you to create, manage, and publish a variety of content types including portal content, notifications, mobile content, and tasks.
          - [Microsites](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-rich-content.md) -- Rich Content Editor enables content managers and admins to create HTML-based content for the Employee Center Pro topic and portal pages using a visual drag-and-drop interface.
            - [Create rich content](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-content-library-portal-rich-content.md) -- Use the Rich Content Editor to build long form content with an easy to use web styled tool.
            - [Create and edit content from portal widgets](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-create-content-widgets.md) -- Use the widget authoring shortcuts to create and edit rich, banner, styled, and news (edit only) content directly from the employee portal. When you use the widget shortcuts, the system generates a publish plan to deliver the content to that specific widget.
            - [Add predefined content layouts with the Rich Content Editor](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/add-modules-rich-content-editor.md) -- Use modules to easily add new content layouts containing headers, paragraph text, and images. Choose from layouts comprised of three vertical cards, three horizontal cards, or a side-by-side configuration with an image positioned to the right of a text block.
            - [Add columns with the Rich Content Editor](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-rich-content-canvas.md) -- Use the Rich Content Editor canvas to create columns to help define and organize your layout for your page.
            - [Add a Divider with the Rich Content Editor](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-rich-content-divider.md) -- Add a horizontal Divider into your canvas to visually separate elements or highlight important sections.
            - [Add an Image with the Rich Content Editor](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-rich-content-image.md) -- Use the Rich Content Editor canvas to add images in your content.
            - [Add a Video with the Rich Content Editor](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-rich-content-video.md) -- Use the Rich Content Editor canvas to add videos in your content.
            - [Add Text or a Text section with the Rich Content Editor](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-rich-content-text.md) -- Use the Rich Content Editor canvas to add Text or a Text section in your content.
            - [Add a Button with the Rich Content Editor](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-rich-content-button.md) -- Add a Button to trigger actions or redirect users to different content.
            - [Add a Link or Link block with the Rich Content Editor](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-rich-content-link-block.md) -- Use the Rich Content Editor canvas to add a link or a link block to redirect users to different content or a web page. A Link provides a textbox and a Link block allows you to add an image that acts as a link.
            - [Add a List with the Rich Content Editor](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-rich-content-editor-list.md) -- Add a numbered or bullet list to better organize your content.
            - [Add Tabs with Rich Content Editor](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-rich-content-tabs.md) -- Add tabs to your rich content to help your users navigate efficiently by allowing them to select the various tabs to reveal the associated content within them.
            - [Add an Accordion with Rich Content Editor](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-rich-content-editor-accordion.md) -- Add an accordion component to the canvas to design content that can be expanded or collapsed.
            - [Add a Table with Rich Content Editor](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-rich-content-editor-table.md) -- Add a table to your content to organize information in rows and columns.
            - [Editing source code in the Rich Content Editor](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/rce-editing-source-code.md) -- Modify the HTML and CSS source code for all the elements in the canvas or for a specific element.
            - [Copy and Paste in the Rich Content Editor](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/rce-copy-paste-source-code.md) -- Copy and paste HTML and CSS source code for elements in the canvas.
          - [News articles](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-news-articles.md) -- The News article content type combines content creation features from the Rich Content Editor with new publishing methods that enable high volume content publishing to the portal and Now Mobile app to keep employees updated on company news and announcements.
            - [Create a news article](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-content-library-news-article.md) -- Use News articles to keep employees updated on company news and announcements.
            - [Create a news article template](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-create-news-template.md) -- Create a news article template to enable content authors to reuse the article layout to rapidly assemble news articles.
            - [Publishing news articles](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-content-publish-news-articles.md) -- News articles can be published via a publish plan or using Content templates to auto-generate publish plans. These auto-generated publish plans are inactive by default and must be activated for News articles to appear in the portal.
            - [Hide News and Events from the Mega Menu](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/hide-news-center-mega-menu.md) -- The News Center menu option appears in the primary navigation menu by default, however, a portal admin can remove it from the menu.
          - [Company events](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-company-events.md) -- Host live company events directly in the employee portal, with prebuilt configurations to streamline the pre-event communications and handle traffic surges. Content authors can easily create and share event content using the drag-and-drop Rich Content Editor and mass-publishing capabilities.
            - [Create a company event](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/create-company-event.md) -- Use company events to configure a live-streamed event.
            - [Publishing company events](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-publish-company-events.md) -- Company events can be published via a publish plan or using Content templates to auto-generate publish plans. These auto-generated publish plans are inactive by default and must be activated for company events to appear in the portal.
            - [Workplace Service Delivery Integration](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-wsd-integration-company-events.md) -- Create new reservations and make changes to existing reservations for your company events from the Workplace Service Management portal, which integrates with Employee Center Pro.
              - [Create Company Event with Workplace Service Management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-wsd-integration-create-company-event.md) -- Create new company events and make changes to existing company events from the Workplace Service Management portal, which integrates with Employee Center Pro.
              - [Company Event Troubleshooting](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-wsd-integration-troubleshooting.md) -- Company event troubleshooting steps help resolve reservation changes and cancellations.
            - [Attendee List and RSVP for company events](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-attendee-list-company-events.md) -- Attendee list can be viewed for company events.
          - [Portal content](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-streamline-content.md) -- The Content Library is your one-stop location for creating and publishing a variety of content types to appear on the employee portal.
            - [Create customized media with styled content](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-content-library-portal-styled.md) -- Create banners, block/announcements, or videos using the styled content type to customize settings such as text color, text alignment, links, background colors, and images on Employee Center Pro.
            - [Create video content](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-content-library-portal-video.md) -- Using the Content Library, you can create video content to appear on the employee portal.
            - [Create URL content](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-content-library-portal-url.md) -- Using the Content Library, you can create URL content containing a link to information.
            - [Create image-based link content](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-content-library-portal-image.md) -- Using the Content Library, you can upload a picture or graphic and link it to a url.
            - [Create events content](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-content-library-portal-events.md) -- Using Content Library, you can create content that announce events to your employees.
            - [Create banner content](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-content-library-portal-banner.md) -- Using the Content Library, you can create banner content that appears on the employee portal.
            - [Create rich text content](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-content-library-portal-richtext.md) -- Using the Content Library, you can create rich text content, which enables you to format your text in a creative and attention-grabbing way.
            - [Create calendar content](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-content-library-portal-calendar.md) -- Add a calendar to the employee portal to provide employees with a quick way of viewing upcoming company events, such as holidays.
            - [Add or modify links to other content sources](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ecpro-manage-link-content.md) -- Use link content to create URL or video links. You can use these links on the Employee Center, in a campaign, or in Communities (when Communities is installed).
            - [Add or modify block content](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ecpro-manage-block-content.md) -- Create block content as reusable information you can insert into campaigns, notifications, rich-text announcements, or community posts (when community is installed).
          - [Notification content](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ec-notification-content.md) -- Create email, push, and SMS notifications to send messages directly to your employees. Messages can also be sent as part of a campaign.
            - [Create email, SMS, or push notification content](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/employee-service-management/employee-experience-foundation/ecpro-manage-notification-content.md) -- Use Notification Content to send an information blast directly to your employees via email, SMS, or push to their mobile devices. Notifications can be used to direct users to the portal for detailed information.
